executive_summary: Canada is experiencing an unprecedented ransomware surge with 104 organizations compromised in a single 48-hour period across all economic sectors. High-profile victims include Canada Goose (hit by two separate gangs: coinbasecartel and shinyhunters), Markham Stouffville Hospital, National Money Mart (database leaked by Everest gang), Eastern Townships School Board, and Peterborough Public Health. The Qilin ransomware group alone is responsible for 20 victims, followed by Play (10 victims), Clop (15 victims), and SafePay (11 victims). This coordinated wave of attacks spans healthcare, education, public sector, financial services, manufacturing, and critical infrastructure—indicating either a mass vulnerability exploitation or widespread credential compromise affecting Canadian entities.

canada_landscape.summary: Canada experienced a massive ransomware attack wave affecting 104 organizations across all provinces in 48 hours. Critical sectors impacted include healthcare (Markham Stouffville Hospital, Labtician Ophthalmics, BioPharma Services), education (Eastern Townships School Board, Collge Superieur De Montreal, teccart.qc.ca), public sector (Peterborough Public Health, Workers Health & Safety Centre, Municipality of North Perth, Thunder Bay Counselling), and infrastructure. No CCCS advisories were published during this period despite the scale of attacks.
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose breached by two separate ransomware groups (Coinbasecartel and Shinyhunters), Active Green + Ross compromised by Sinobi gang, Kids & Company (childcare services) hit by Sinobi
canada_landscape.financial: National Money Mart Company suffered database leak by Everest ransomware gang; Morison Insurance Brokers breached by Sinobi; multiple accounting firms compromised including Pewarchuk CPA (Play), MG Chartered Professional Accountant (Qilin), and Bergmanis Preyra law/accounting (Qilin)

report_2w.executive_summary: A critical zero-day vulnerability in Fortinet FortiClient EMS is being actively exploited in the wild, requiring immediate patching. The European Commission suffered a major supply chain breach via the TeamPCP threat actor group, who poisoned the Trivy security scanner, exposing data from 30 EU entities in a 92GB leak. North Korean state actors (UNC1069) are running a sophisticated social engineering campaign targeting top Node.js and npm maintainers to compromise the JavaScript supply chain. Canada's cybersecurity authority (CCCS) issued an alert for CVE-2026-3055 affecting Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway products. Multiple Progress ShareFile vulnerabilities allow server takeover without authentication.

items.description: Vulnerability impacting Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway
items.software_affected: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway

items.description: Critical zero-day vulnerability in Fortinet FortiClient EMS actively exploited in the wild

items.description: Critical authentication bypass in PraisonAI allowing any bearer token to gain full access to agent capabilities
items.cia_impact: Confidentiality: High, Integrity: High, Availability: Medium

items.ttps: T1566.001 (Phishing: Spearphishing Attachment), T1078 (Valid Accounts)

canada_landscape.summary: The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) issued advisory AL26-006 on March 30, 2026, warning of CVE-2026-3055 affecting Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway products. No specific breaches of major Canadian retailers or financial institutions were identified in this reporting period. General Canadian news items related to geopolitics and non-cyber topics dominated r/canada discussions.
